Annual Report

Item 1. Business. We are a technology company that builds products enabling people to connect with each other.

We invest substantial resources in the development of generative AI features across our family of apps. Our foundation models are trained on large volumes of data, including publicly available content from the web and content people share on our platforms when consent allows.

We disclose how training data is collected and used in our privacy policy. Certain jurisdictions provide opt-out mechanisms for users who do not want their content used for model training.

Risk factors: The use of artificial intelligence and machine learning in our products involves emerging regulatory scrutiny.

We invest in physical infrastructure, including data centers, to support demand.

Competition is intense in the technology sector, including from startups, established technology companies, and telecommunications providers.
